name: Distributed Training
text1: A group coordinated a training run across home computers in several countries. The run was slow and produced a model with limited capabilities.
text2: A training run was coordinated across ordinary computers in dozens of countries. No single country hosted the operation. The resulting model rivals frontier labs.
image-prompt: A world map with hundreds of small glowing nodes connected by thin red lines forming a web, dark background, data visualization style, ominous feel, digital painting, no text
